description: Re-derivation machinery unit 2.1b (DEC-0036 step 2): config-declared substrate invariants — relocate the two hardcoded validateProject invariants (completed-task-has-verification, decision-cites-forcing-artifact) to config.invariants[] requires-edge class consumed by a vocabulary-free generic loop. Closes FGAP-065 (DEC-0025 violation).
acceptance_criteria: config.invariants[] requires-edge class + schema version bump
validateProject generic loop with zero hardcoded block/status/relation literals
2 canonical invariants declared as config data
tests incl. ABSENCE case + foreign-vocabulary DEC-0025 universalization
